name: Cream Cheese and Mushroom Enchiladas
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in the oil.
2. Stir in the chopped tomatoes, picante sauce, 2 tsp chili powder, 2 tsp coriander, and 1/2 tsp cumin. Simmer for 15 minutes.
3. In a 10-inch skillet, cook the mushrooms with the remaining chili powder and coriander until tender and liquid evaporates.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the cream cheese. Stir in 1/4 cup of picante sauce and green onions.
5. Spoon about 1/3 cup of mushroom mixture down the center of each tortilla.
6. Roll up, placing seam side down in a greased 12 x 7-inch pan.
7. Spoon remaining picante sauce over the enchiladas.
8. Cover tightly with foil and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and top with cheese.
10. Serve with sour cream, lettuce, and additional picante.
